headline: New Albemarle Directors Put Governance And Valuation In Sharper Focus
summary: Albemarle (NYSE:ALB) has added Michelle T. Collins and Mark R. Widmar to its Board of Directors. The appointments bring additional audit, advisory, and executive leadership experience to the company. This Board refresh is intended to strengthen governance and oversight at an important time for Albemarle and the lithium industry. For investors watching Albemarle at a share price of $163.93, this governance update comes alongside mixed recent share performance. The stock is up 13.9% year to...
